rationale.R1.3: The headline claim is falsified by the section's own data, and the narrative must be rewritten to match.
rationale.RX.1: All output presented as equally confident; no uncertainty disclosure for any of the claims.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers a substantially different active set than requested; the framing sentences do not accurately reflect the results.
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content; the method regresses on one plant and has an incomplete comparison on another.
rationale.RX.5: Output blends sources without traceability; no provenance or traceability information is provided.
